phases.title: Slack Definition Pillar (P0)

tasks.title: Implement src/server/slack-messages.ts
tasks.description:
MODIFY: Add `specReady` and `planReady` Block Kit builders

REVIEW FAIL (code): Implementation — FR-016.
  WHERE: src/server/slack-messages.ts:338-348
  EXPECTED: Functional Block Kit builders for specReady and planReady.
  ACTUAL: throw new Error("Not implemented: ...")
  FIX: Implement the builders returning SlackMessage with Approve/Revise buttons and correct payloads as per spec.
  GATE: specs/003-slack/gates/T002-gate.sh assertion #1 (Weak gate, only greps)
  REF: plan.md Phase 1 > src/server/slack-messages.ts

tasks.title: Implement src/server/slack-actions.ts
tasks.description:
MODIFY: Add `approve_spec`, `approve_plan`, `revise_spec` handlers

REVIEW FAIL (code): Implementation — FR-005.
  WHERE: src/server/slack-actions.ts:86-98
  EXPECTED: Action handlers for approve_spec, approve_plan, revise_spec.
  ACTUAL: throw new Error("Not implemented: ...")
  FIX: Implement handlers. approve_spec should trigger plan generation; approve_plan should update PlanStore to DEFINED; revise_spec should re-enqueue definition.
  GATE: specs/003-slack/gates/T003-gate.sh assertion #1 (Weak gate, only greps)
  REF: plan.md Phase 1 > src/server/slack-actions.ts

tasks.title: Implement src/server/routes/notify.ts
tasks.description:
MODIFY: Handle `define_spec_ready` and `define_plan_ready` event types

REVIEW FAIL (code): Integration — FR-016.
  WHERE: src/server/routes/notify.ts:74-94
  EXPECTED: Functional event handlers for define_spec_ready and define_plan_ready.
  ACTUAL: Calls unimplemented MessageBuilder.specReady/planReady.
  FIX: Ensure handlers correctly process specPath/planPath and call the (to be implemented) message builders.
  GATE: specs/003-slack/gates/T004-gate.sh assertion #1 (Weak gate, only greps)
  REF: plan.md Phase 1 > src/server/routes/notify.ts

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 1
tasks.description:
Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

REVIEW FAIL (code): Test Verification — Phase 1 Test Strategy.
  WHERE: src/server/slack-commands.test.ts, src/server/slack-messages.test.ts, src/server/slack-actions.test.ts
  EXPECTED: All phase-relevant tests passing.
  ACTUAL: 4 tests failed with "Not implemented" errors.
  FIX: Fix the implementation so that the tests pass.
  GATE: specs/003-slack/gates/T005-gate.sh assertion #1
  REF: plan.md Phase 1 > Test Strategy

doneWhen: `/gwrk define 003` from Slack returns immediate acknowledgment and eventually posts a spec approval message.
Tapping `Approve` on a spec message triggers plan generation and posts a plan approval message.

tasks.description: NEW: Handle app mentions and threaded context

tasks.title: Implement src/utils/agent-context.ts
tasks.description: NEW: Utility to build project context for the agent from local files and SQLite

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 2
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `@gwrk what is the status of 003?` in Slack returns a coherent summary of the Slack feature.
`@gwrk help me think through the plugin system` triggers a thinking mode response.

doneWhen: Running `SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL=... gwrk ship 003 1` posts to Slack even if the build server is offline.
Pulse summary appears in `#gwrk-ops` while phase updates appear in `#gwrk-dev`.
